hooks.command: bash -c 'json=$(cat); file_path=$(echo "$json" | jq -r .tool_input.file_path); if [[ "$file_path" == *.py ]]; then echo "🔍 Checking Python file: $file_path" && cd "$(echo "$json" | jq -r .cwd)" && echo "  📝 Type checking..." && (if command -v dmypy &> /dev/null; then dmypy run -- ragzoom --ignore-missing-imports --no-error-summary --check-untyped-defs; else mypy ragzoom --ignore-missing-imports --no-error-summary --check-untyped-defs; fi) && echo "  🧹 Linting..." && ruff check "$file_path"; fi'
